Sustaining
Readiness. Source the standardized AFT/CFT kit, individual NSN line items, or fully customized H2F facility equipment through one channel. Envision serves all branches of the U.S. Department of War and federal agencies through the DLA Holistic Health and Fitness program.

SECTION 02 // PROCUREMENT CHANNELS 02 / 05

One channel. Two ways to source readiness.

$18M+ FY26 Channel Volume
12 AFT/CFT NSN Items

The DLA Holistic Health and Fitness program covers two procurement pathways. Whether you need the complete fitness test kit, individual NSN items, or a custom facility build-out, the order moves through one channel from quote to delivery.

// Common Misconception The fitness test branding is Army, but H2F is not Army-only.

Despite the Army's AFT/CFT branding, H2F equipment is available to every branch of the U.S. Department of War (SOCOM, Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, Space Force, Coast Guard, National Guard) and to federal agencies including DHS, Customs & Border Protection, TSA, and federal law enforcement.

PATHWAY 01

AFT/CFT
Test Kit

// AFT/CFT // 12 NSN ITEMS

The standardized 12-item NSN equipment set supports training and readiness in line with the Army's updated AFT and CFT physical fitness standards. Available as the complete kit or as individual NSN items for replacements and partial orders. Available across all DoW branches and federal agencies through DLA.

  • Order the complete kit or any individual NSN line item
  • Standardized NSN catalog through DLA
  • Kit assembly and repackaging at the Envision Wichita campus
  • DLA stocks inventory and ships direct to the end customer
  • Open to SOCOM, all DoW branches, and federal agencies (DHS, CBP, USCG, TSA)
// Anchor SKU 6930-01-692-1671 REQUEST QUOTE PER ORDER
PATHWAY 02

Customizable
H2F Solutions

// COMMERCIAL // SCOPE-REVIEWED // CUSTOM

Beyond the standardized AFT/CFT items. Full facility outfitting through commercial off-the-shelf procurement: strength, cardio, turf, recovery, and forward-deployed container builds. Each request reviewed for scope.

  • Commercial off-the-shelf equipment from authorized OEMs
  • Customer direct delivery, CONUS and OCONUS supported
  • Prime Vendor Support and Dedicated TVLS available
  • MILSTRIP and G-INV order methods accepted
// Scope-reviewed per order CUSTOM QUOTE

SECTION 04 // CHANNEL ARCHITECTURE 04 / 05

One accountable channel from quote to delivery.

Envision is the dedicated contract support for the DLA H2F program. Envision supplies DLA with kits and NSN line items; DLA stocks the inventory and fulfills orders direct to the end customer.

  • // 01
    Scope & Quote

    Direct coordination with the equipment manufacturer to confirm requirements, prepare the G-INV quote, and ready the order for DLA submission via MILSTRIP or G-INV.

    →
  • // 02
    Order Management

    Envision handles vendor coordination, logistics, and order tracking through DLA award and into the DLA fulfillment pipeline.

    →
  • // 03
    Kitting & Delivery

    Kit assembly and repackaging happen at the Envision Wichita campus. Envision supplies DLA with the completed kits and individual NSN items; DLA warehouses the inventory and ships direct to the end customer.

    →
// AWARDS THE CONTRACT DLA Troop Support
ENVISION Industries
// SUPPLIES THE EQUIPMENT OEM Vendor
// RECEIVES THE ORDER Warfighter

SECTION 05 // EQUIPMENT CATALOG CAT.001 // FY26

Standardized items. Custom builds. Every branch.

Two procurement pathways, one catalog of record. The standardized AFT/CFT inventory is available as a complete kit or as individual NSN items. Toggle between AFT/CFT and the customizable H2F solution profile.

// Manufacturing & 3PL Partners
Hoplites
XMT Solutions
Hoplites
XMT Solutions
All 12 NSN items are individually orderable. Order the complete kit (Anchor SKU 6930-01-692-1671) for a full AFT/CFT setup, or order single line items for replacements, partial deployments, or unit-specific needs. Pricing changes frequently — request a current quote per order.

12
// Equipment Baseline

One catalog. Both tests.

The Army split the ACFT into the Army Fitness Test (AFT) and Combat Fitness Test (CFT).

Our standardized 12-item NSN catalog supports training and readiness for both.

One equipment baseline. Zero disruption to your unit’s readiness plan.

// Active Program: DLA H2F Program
// 01

Commercial Off the Shelf

Strength platforms, cardio equipment, turf, recovery systems, and specialized training tools sourced from authorized commercial OEMs.

// 02

Customer Direct Delivery

Equipment ships direct to installation, unit, or forward operating site. CONUS and OCONUS supported, including expeditionary container builds.

// 03

Prime Vendor Support

Envision provides single-source accountability across multi-OEM solutions. One PO. One channel. One point of contact.

// 04

Dedicated TVLS

Tailored Vendor Logistics Support for high-volume installations and multi-site rollouts requiring coordinated delivery.

// 05

Scope Review

Each request is reviewed by DLA for program scope and routed to the appropriate procurement pathway.

// 06

MILSTRIP & G-INV

Orders accepted via MILSTRIP and G-INV through standard DLA channels. G-INV replaced MIPR/7600B in late 2025.

// Order Methods Accepted
MILSTRIP G-INV
